Its bulk on this field can be surprising: Its bulk on this field can be surprising to some. It can deal glorious damage to unsuspecting vermin.
And as for Angie's signature move, Cold: And as for Angie's signature move, Cold Truth... Haha...
The culmination of Angie's strength and: The culmination of Angie's strength and her faith in the Lord... All in one move.
It's powerful and can subject your Pokém: It's powerful and can subject your Pokémon to tormenting memories that leave them unable to repeat actions.
CERA: Angie's Field is a manipulation of: CERA: Angie's Field is a manipulation of the Dimensional Field. A perfect field for one as noble as her!
On this field, Ice types have their defe: On this field, Ice types have their defenses boosted, while Fire types have them weakened.
Dark and Ice-type attacks get a fairly s: Dark and Ice-type attacks get a fairly significant boost in power.
Moves such as Flame Burst, Burn Up, and: Moves such as Flame Burst, Burn Up, and several others have the ability to melt the field into a regular Dimensional Field.
Be aware that Angie can bring back her f: Be aware that Angie can bring back her field at any point with Cold Truth after two uses.
You aren't very smart, so let me remind: You aren't very smart, so let me remind you that Angie is a user of Ice-Type Pokémon.
Normally Fire-Type Pokémon would be enou: Normally Fire-Type Pokémon would be enough to melt even the toughest of ice.
But the ice in this land is very differe: But the ice in this land is very different. It is comprised of nothing but Never-Melt Ice.
Therefore Fire-Type attacks won't be hel: Therefore Fire-Type attacks won't be helping you much here.
I'd suggest using weather moves to remov: I'd suggest using weather moves to remove Hail, as that chips off HP each turn.
If the field is changed, Angie can bring: If the field is changed, Angie can bring it back to her own field with Cold Truth.
This battle is doubles, so using Wide Gu: This battle is doubles, so using Wide Guard may be useful here as well.
What else can I bore myself explaining... Oh, yes... The use of screen moves.
Angie uses Aurora Veil. You'd do well ha: Angie uses Aurora Veil. You'd do well having screen shattering moves.
